description: Case style: Analog watch with a rectangular stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Silver dial with black hands Strap style: Grey genuine leather strap with a green stitch and tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 1 year
